sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78226" key="parakollhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρακολλ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n78226.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">healing by 'first intention'</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">π. ἀγωγή</foreign>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συσσάρκωσις</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:17:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.17.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
